currentFocus: post-v0.2.0 Save/write stabilization complete; independent review required before feature or release work
completedThisSprint: Save-state transitions moved behind durable reread-verified receipts for scalar and structured preview paths
exact bytes, SHA-256, inode/device, metadata, occurrence/record, target, and source-graph drift checks added
active writes consolidated on exclusive same-directory synchronized atomic exchange with swap-back recovery
active backups moved to restrictive XDG state storage with exclusive creation and integrity verification
one-file pending batches made all-or-nothing and multi-file batches rejected before writing
default tests made hermetic and current documentation reconciled with implementation

saveTransaction.sameFile: all rows preflighted and staged into one candidate; one backup and one atomic exchange; all pending state clears after durable success only
saveTransaction.multiFile: rejected before backup or write because cross-file crash atomicity is not implemented

safetyBoundaries.realConfigTouchedScope: false during this stabilization sprint and normal tests
safetyBoundaries.productionBehaviorScope: guarded scalar Save plus proven hl.animation and hl.curve modify-existing persistence
safetyBoundaries.structuredFamilyWriteScope: ONLY via gated proven modify-existing hl.animation and hl.curve record paths; monitor, bind, gesture, device, and permission remain blocked

validationEvidence.normalCargoTestRunOne: 1154 passed, 0 failed, 25 ignored; no status, diff, or report churn
validationEvidence.normalCargoTestRunTwo: 1154 passed, 0 failed, 25 ignored; no status, diff, or report churn
validationEvidence.isolatedHomeCargoTest: 1154 passed, 0 failed, 25 ignored; hyprctl trap not invoked

activeNextWork: Run an independent review of the stabilized write, restore, and pending-state paths before considering feature or release work.
doNotContinue: do not promote scalar rows or structured families
do not add runtime-preview or hardware proof coverage
do not expand source/include, duplicate, profile, display, or style behavior
do not run active-config write proofs without explicit approval
do not run hyprctl reload or monitor/display mutation
do not merge, tag, publish, or modify release artifacts

releaseCandidate.name: v0.2.0-rc.1
releaseCandidate.status: historical release candidate used for final release validation
